title: ChatObservedPayload
description: Raw in-game chat as observed by the world bridge (self-filtered: a bot never observes its own utterance). The enriched conversational fact is VillagerTalked on social.events. Envelope aggregateId = the OBSERVING villager. Producer: minecraft-service on world.events.

villagerId.description: The speaker's villagerId resolved via the mc:roster hash; null when the speaker is not a roster villager (e.g. a human player).

speakerUsername.description: The raw in-game username of the speaker — always present, even when villagerId is null.

heardByIds.description: Roster villagers in earshot (excluding the speaker).
